name: analysis
description: calculate the risk level of diabetes onset based on user input of the blood test results, the function is called only when there is some blood test results.

labtest_date.description: blood test date in format yyyy-mm-dd

cholesHDL.description: blood test result for Cholesterol in HDL in Serum or Plasma

choles.description: blood test result for Cholesterol in Serum or Plasma

creatinine.description: blood test for Creatinine Renal Clearance

fastingGlucose.description: blood test result for Fasting Glucose in Serum or Plasma

triglyceride.description: blood test result for Triglyceride in Serum or Plasma

potassiumSerumOrPlasma.description: blood test result for Potassium in Serum or Plasma

HBA1C.description: blood test result for HbA1c in Blood in %

time_spec.description: the length of time period about which the use want to know the diabetes onset risk

name: advise
description: give health advise on diabetes health management or answer the patients enquiry about the health status
